ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "psa_1" TEXT /* Product category 1 */,
  "psa_2" TEXT /* Product category 2 */,
  "article" INTEGER /* Article number */,
  "web_description" TEXT /* Web description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the product */,
  "pack_qty" INTEGER /* Pack quantity */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used */,
  "dq_score" INTEGER /* Quality score (DQ Score) */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "product_video" TEXT /* Video of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "product_keywords" TEXT /* Relevant keywords for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_price" REAL /* Price of the product from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "moq" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, supplier, customer) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dq_scores" (
  "dq_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DQ score */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "dq_score" INTEGER /* DQ score given to the product */,
  "dq_score_date" TEXT /* Date the DQ score was given */,
  "dq_score_type" TEXT /* Type of DQ score (e.g. initial, updated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dq_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dq_scores_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: Price of the product from the supplier
Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product
Minimum order quantity for the supplier
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Quantity of the product in the warehouse
Unique identifier for each order item
Role of the user (e.g. admin, supplier, customer)
Password of the user (hashed for security)
Date and time when the user account was created
Unique identifier for each DQ score
DQ score given to the product
Date the DQ score was given
Type of DQ score (e.g. initial, updated)
